Arrival & pass analysis: an asterisk means that the number of same approach code arrivals and passes is equal to or greater than the number of platforms.
If the total number of arrivals and passes at the same time exceeds the number of platforms the 'Trains present at location analysis' will show an asterisk.

column4: Services arriving within 1 minute with their arrival times and approach codes

column1: Departure & pass analysis: an asterisk means that the number of same exit code departures and passes is equal to or greater than the number of platforms.
If the total number of departures and passes at the same time exceeds the number of platforms the 'Trains present at location analysis' will show an asterisk.

column4: Services departing within 1 minute with their departure times and exit codes

column1: Trains present at location analysis: an asterisk means that the number of trains at the location is greater than the number of platforms.

column5: Services at the location at that time
